summary:
The patient’s vivid dreams can reasonably be attributed to starting escitalopram; however, his increased saliva production seems unrelated based on current evidence for this medication. \boxed{sialorrhea}

The other symptoms—vivid dreams and decreased libido—are well-documented SSRI-related side-effects but lack specific mention regarding their association with escitalopram compared to nausea being more commonly reported. Therefore,
\boxed{\text{sialorrhea}} stands out less plausibly connected to esctalorpram use than others provided here. 

Note how I've streamlined explanations while maintaining focus solely on clinically-relevant aspects pertinent to identifying plausible vs implausible side-effect associations due to prescribed treatment.
